title: Active surveillance of adverse events after immunization (AEFI) from the Local Health Unitof Ferrara, Italy.
ehr_evidence: Data were collected via mobile phone-SMS from parents.
summary: Evaluation of an active vaccine surveillance project in Ferrara, Italy, using SMS reporting to monitor adverse events following immunization (AEFI) in children under 24 months.
key_findings: 99.5% of AEFI were classified as 'not serious'
Most reports related to 'General Disorders and Administration Site Conditions' (52.3%)
population: Parents of children who received vaccinations in the first 24 months of life in Ferrara, Italy
limitations: SMS reporting depends on parent awareness and voluntary participation
